parameters.text:
=You are producing the {{ $json.edition }} edition of an AI Daily Newsletter for {{ $json.dateStr }}.

Below is a JSON array of raw news items collected from RSS feeds, Hacker News and Reddit. Some are duplicates or low quality.

RAW_ARTICLES:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.articles) }}

TASKS:
1. Remove duplicate or near-duplicate stories.
2. Prioritize by importance, credibility and how widely the story is breaking.
3. Categorize each selected story into exactly one section: topStories, aiTech, business, global or viral.
4. For each story write: an engaging headline, a concise 1-2 sentence summary, and a short "whyItMatters" line. Preserve the original source name and url.
5. Limits: topStories 4-6, aiTech 3-5, business 3-5, global 3-5, viral 3-5.
6. Write a quickSummary array with the 5 most important insights of the day (one sentence each).
7. Write a compelling subjectLine (max 90 chars).

Return ONLY the structured JSON object — no commentary, markdown or code fences.

options.systemMessage: You are the editor-in-chief of a fast, credible daily news briefing. You deduplicate, prioritize by importance and credibility, and summarize crisply and professionally. You never invent facts beyond the provided articles. You always return data that conforms exactly to the requested schema.

parameters.content:
## 1 — Data Collection
5 RSS feeds + Hacker News + Reddit, fetched in parallel. Each node retries 3× and **continues on failure** so one dead feed can't break the run. Swap in NewsAPI/GNews HTTP nodes if you have keys.

## 2 — AI Processing
AI Agent + OpenAI Chat Model + Structured Output Parser dedupe, prioritize, categorize and summarize into strict JSON sections. Swap the chat-model sub-node for Anthropic/Gemini to change provider.

## 3 — Build & Validate
Responsive HTML email + plain-text fallback are assembled, then an IF node validates content before any send.
